---
title: "Speakers"
---

::: {.speaker-gallery}

::: {.speaker-profile}
![](assets/img/speakers/alessandro-bonetti.jpg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Dr. Alessandro Bonetti"}

### Dr. Alessandro Bonetti

Director at <br>
AstraZeneca
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
[![](assets/img/speakers/gab-corso.jpeg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Dr. Gabriele Corso"}](https://gcorso.github.io/){target="_blank"}

### [Dr. Gabriele Corso](https://gcorso.github.io/){target="_blank"}

Co-founder and CEO at <br>
Boltz
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
[![](assets/img/speakers/fabfro.jpeg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Dr. Fabian Frohlich"}](https://www.crick.ac.uk/research/labs/fabian-frohlich){target="_blank"}

### [Dr. Fabian Frohlich](https://www.crick.ac.uk/research/labs/fabian-frohlich){target="_blank"}

Group Leader at <br>
The Francis Crick Institute
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
![](assets/img/speakers/mikhail-kabeshov.jpeg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Dr. Mikhail Kabeshov"}

### Dr. Mikhail Kabeshov

Project Leader at <br>
AstraZeneca
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
[![](assets/img/speakers/mikemamalakis.png){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Prof. Michail Mamalakis"}](https://www.cst.cam.ac.uk/people/mm2703){target="_blank"}

### [Prof. Michail Mamalakis](https://www.cst.cam.ac.uk/people/mm2703){target="_blank"}

Assistant Research Professor at <br>
CRUK Cambridge Institute
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
[![](assets/img/speakers/est-wer.jpg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Dr. Esther Wershof"}](https://www.linkedin.com/in/esther-wershof-585b35220/){target="_blank"}

### [Dr. Esther Wershof](https://www.linkedin.com/in/esther-wershof-585b35220/){target="_blank"}

Machine Learning Lead at <br>
Altos Labs
:::

:::

## 

::: {.speaker-gallery}

::: {.speaker-profile}
[![](assets/img/speakers/ilaria-billato.jpeg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Ilaria Billato"}](https://github.com/billila){target="_blank"}

### [Dr. Ilaria Billato](https://github.com/billila){target="_blank"}

PostDoc at <br>
University of Padova, Dept. of Biology
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
![](assets/img/speakers/tania-bobbo.jpg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Tania Bobbo"}

### Dr. Tania Bobbo

CNR Researcher at <br>
CNR IBBA Milano
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
[![](assets/img/speakers/tiansi-dong.jpg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Dr. Tiansi Dong"}](https://tiansidr.github.io/){target="_blank"}

### [Dr. Tiansi Dong](https://tiansidr.github.io/){target="_blank"}

Research Scientist at <br>
Alan Turing Institute
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
![](assets/img/speakers/johawe.png){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Dr. Johann Hawe"}

### Dr. Johann Hawe

AI Engineer at <br>
Illumina - Artificial Intelligence Lab
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
![](assets/img/speakers/anu-limdi.jpg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Dr. Anurag Limdi"}

### Dr. Anurag Limdi

ML Scientist at <br>
EMBL-EBI
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
[![](assets/img/speakers/lerry-melidis.jpg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Lerry Melidis"}](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6853-2722){target="_blank"}

### [Dr. Lerry Melidis](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6853-2722){target="_blank"}

PostDoc at <br>
University of Cambridge, CRUK Cambridge Institute
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
[![](assets/img/speakers/bianca-pierattini.jpg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Bianca Pierattini"}](https://www.linkedin.com/in/biancapierattini){target="_blank"}

### [Dr. Bianca Pierattini](https://www.linkedin.com/in/biancapierattini){target="_blank"}

PostDoc at <br>
University of Cambridge, Biochemistry Department
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
![](assets/img/speakers/davide-rigoni.jpeg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Davide Rigoni"}

### Davide Rigoni

PostDoc at <br>
University of Padova
:::

:::

##

::: {.speaker-gallery}

::: {.speaker-profile}
![](assets/img/speakers/fabio-bove.png){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Fabio Bove"}

### Fabio Bove

PhD Student at <br>
University of Padova
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
![](assets/img/speakers/irwin-christofer.png){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Irwin Christofer"}

### Irwin Christofer

PhD Student at <br>
University of Cambridge, Dept. of Computer Science and Technology
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
![](assets/img/speakers/massimiliano-coretti.png){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Massimiliano Coretti"}

### Massimiliano Coretti

PhD Student at <br>
University of Cambridge, Dept. of Computer Science and Technology
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
[![](assets/img/speakers/andrea-di-francesco.jpeg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Andrea Giuseppe di Francesco"}](https://sites.google.com/uniroma1.it/andreagiuseppedifrancesco/home-page){target="_blank"}

### [Andrea Giuseppe di Francesco](https://sites.google.com/uniroma1.it/andreagiuseppedifrancesco/home-page){target="_blank"}

PhD Student at <br>
Sapienza University of Rome
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
![](assets/img/speakers/dav-mill.jpeg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="David Miller"}

### David Miller

PhD Candidate at <br>
University College London
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
![](assets/img/speakers/salvo-romano.png){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Salvo Romano"}

### Salvo Romano

PhD Student at <br>
University of Catania
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
![](assets/img/speakers/andrea-rubbi.png){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Andrea Rubbi"}

### Andrea Rubbi

PhD Student at <br>
University of Cambridge, Dept. of Computer Science and Technology
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
![](assets/img/speakers/wageesha-widuranga.png){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Wageesha Widuranga"}

### Wageesha Widuranga

PhD Student at <br>
University of Padova
:::

:::
